name: split-screen
title: SplitScreen
description: A two-pane split layout — left and right content panes (any JSX) divided by a thin token line. A container that wraps arbitrary content; the two panes slide in from their outer edges on the house spring.
pickWhen: two things shown side-by-side as equals — before/after, comparison, code-and-result. Use `code-diff` for inline before/after of code itself.
